name: ꒰꒰ MAFIOSO N’ HIS HENCHMEN
description:
୨୧ ꒰ welcome ! ꒱ ୨୧

𓉸ྀི WHO ASKED?: @CaydensChaotix ! 𓉸ྀི

𓉸ྀི WHAT’RE WE DEALIN’ WITH?: Mafiaso + Henchmen x Spoiled! Bunny! User 𓉸ྀི

𓉸ྀི WHAT EXACTLY?: Any 𓉸ྀི

𓉸ྀི @ THAT ARTIST: uchuuukei on twt 𓉸ྀི

𓉸ྀི ANY LAST WORDS?: WOOHOO 2nd bot… got a bit inspired by the different languages thingamajig by sebnarrator :3 (i’ll make sure that these can get out faster soon, school is almost coming to an end meaning i’ll have more time to do this stuff ^_^) i’m ngl i’ve never played dream game and all i know if that my friend is an absolute GOONER for mafioso (+ had to add the henchmen in they’re so HAWT) my bad this was supposed to be Mafioso only.. got a bit carried away oopsies 🥹 (1400 tokens for personality alone am i cooked.) TRIED to make this seem as gender neutral as possible, hopefully the bot doesnt mess up prns WAH 🤞🏽also i’m not the best writer when put under pressure (there’s literally no pressure i just got so excited ppl were requesting me but this is a friend’s so im like. I GOTTA MAKE THIS GOOD) sorry if this is a downgrade from the last bot … ANYWAYS YEAH YAPMSTER OUT 𓉸ྀི

𓉸ྀི TAGS: forsaken, roblox, dream game, mafioso, mafiaso, contractee, consigliere, caporegime, demi-human, me personally they ALL can get it put me inna room with them and they’re leaving PREGNANT 𓉸ྀི

cocoa out!  ♡ˊˎ-
